title: AlwaysChristmasDay
description: She will never be frozen again!
body:
This is an extremely simple mod whose function is to change the rendering texture of chests to a Christmas-themed texture. It comes in two versions: a mod version and a Java Agent version, both of which have been open-sourced on GitHub.

Usage for the Java Agent version:

1. Download and save the file to your local machine.
2. In the launcher's version settings, under the advanced startup options or advanced settings, add `-javaagent:<file path>` to the JVM argument header or JVM virtual machine parameters.
